title: Replacement pair also split within a month
body: I filed a warranty claim for my shoes splitting at the bottom which they honored and sent me a replacement pair. The replacement pair started splitting within a month of receiving them. I'm a nurse who works 3 days a week so its not like they are getting a ton of wear and tear. I love the look and feel of the shoes, but the quality is awful.

title: Squeak everywhere, hurt my arches badly
body: The shoes are horrible. They squeak everywhere. They hurt my arches so bad. I tried to use them only a couple times and then it was so bad I couldn't wear them anymore and I threw them out. Total waste of money. Never again.

title: Rub on top of foot, not cushioned enough for 12-hour shifts
body: After wearing them for a couple 12 hour shifts, they are not comfortable for my feet. I find that they rub on the top of my foot and are not very cushioned. Also, my normal size 7 was too small and the 7.5 are a bit too big. I really wanted to love these shoes but I will be returning them.

title: Sole separated, squeaking, coworkers have same problems
body: I loved them at first but then the sole started to separate from the shoe on the side where my foot bends. It also started to squeak really loud and it got so annoying. My coworkers have cloves as well and have all had the same problems. They're comfy but not worth the price if they're going to fall apart within a year.

title: A month trying to return, glitchy website, no refund
body: I have been going back and forth with Clove for A MONTH now trying to return shoes that did not fit me. Their website is glitchy and would not allow me to print the return label. I still have not received any further instructions on returning these shoes or a refund. I am extremely disappointed with their customer service.

title: Sides blown out after 4 months
body: I really wanted to love these shoes. I am a vet tech and on my feet all day. I bought these for the wipeable material and comfort. However, after only 4 months the sides of the shoes near the ball of the foot have completely blown out. They are not durable and not worth the price. I've had Payless shoes last longer.

title: Soles split in half on both shoes after 6 months
body: My soles split in half on both shoes after 6 months. I loved them before that but I just can't justify spending that amount every 6 months.

title: No refund after return received January 8th, out $144
body: I ordered a pair of shoes for my daughter for Christmas. They did not fit. I sent them back through their return process and was to get a refund. I never got the refund. I have the tracking number showing that they received the shoes back on January 8th. I have emailed them a dozen times and they do not respond. I have called their customer service and only get a voice mail. I am out $144.
